data.body: Partial fix: ticket-transition.sh O(N) open-children scan replaced with SNAPSHOT fast-path (7.5x speedup) — eliminates the exit-144 timeout that caused the script access failure. Root cause of hardcoded local path (CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT set to /Users/joeoakhart/digital-service-orchestra instead of plugin cache) requires host project to run: bash plugins/dso/scripts/update-shim.sh <host-project-path> to update the shim.
